paper_title: Shoreline History and Dune Development Study at Skagen Odde

methods.method_name: Map Analysis and Historical Data Collection
methods.description: This method involves collecting and analyzing historical maps and data to understand the shoreline history and dune development at Skagen Odde.

steps.description: The first detailed map of the study area is the one in Resen's Atlas Daniscus from AD 1677.
steps.searchable_summary: collect historical map data from Resen's Atlas Daniscus

steps.description: Maps from The Royal Danish Academy of Sciences and Letters from AD 1793, and topographical maps from AD 1887, AD 1968, and AD 1977 were used.
steps.searchable_summary: collect historical map data from various sources
inputs: The Royal Danish Academy of Sciences and Letters

steps.description: The most recent development of the area is documented by orthophotographs.
steps.searchable_summary: collect recent orthophotographs of the study area

methods.description: This method involves conducting field studies to collect samples and observe sedimentological and geomorphological features.

steps.description: The study area was initially visited in May 2012 (site A).
steps.searchable_summary: conduct initial field visit to site A

steps.description: A closely situated section was studied in February 2014 and August 2014 (site B).
steps.searchable_summary: conduct field visits to site B

steps.description: Samples for OSL dating were collected in the two adjacent coastal sections (sites A and B).
steps.searchable_summary: collect OSL samples from sites A and B

methods.description: This method involves dating aeolian sand samples using OSL to determine the age of sediment deposition.

steps.description: OSL samples were dated at The Nordic Laboratory for Luminescence Dating, DTU Risø Campus.
steps.searchable_summary: perform OSL dating at DTU Risø Campus

steps.description: Results are shown in Table 1 where ages are given as years before dating in the laboratory; in the text the ages are also given as calendar years.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze OSL dating results and convert to calendar years
